title: How To Get Better Youtube Titles!

transcript.text: The biggest outliers in 2026 [music] are stacking three, sometimes four, frames in a single title. You can actually do the same research on your own channel in less than five minutes. Just [music] open vidIQ, go to the AI coach, and ask it, "What are the title formulas winning in my niche right now?" It runs the research, hands you real formulas with real breakout multipliers, [music] tells you the channel sizes that hit those numbers, so you know the pattern that work at your size. [music] Now, imagine pairing that with the thumbnails that are working and killing it in [music] 2026.
